details.IncidentDetail: "[10] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from CHAINS-Chain Control to CLOSURE of a Road by CHP"
"[5] [Notification] [CHP]-Problem changed from CLOSURE of a Road to 1125-Traffic Hazard by CHP"
"[3] TRAFFIC CONTROL IS SET UP FOR WHEN CLOSURE IS IN PLACE -- JUST NEED OFCR AND CT TO SET UP CLOSURE"
"[2] WATER MAIN BROKE ON THE BRIDGE JSO SAN MIGUEL RANCH ROAD -- NEED ROAD CLOSURE FROM SAN MIGUEL TO BONITA MEADOWS LANE "
"[1] [Intersection: Proctor Valley Rd / San Miguel Ranch Rd] [Medium] [Information] BORDERLINE CALL, ROLL CHP AND START CVPD FOR BORDERLINE"
"[43] [Rotation Request Comment] 1039 S and R Tow BC (760) 722-6686 Pub / COPIES ALL - WILL 1021 92-22 DIRECTLY"
"[39] ^***CORRECT 1020 EB 76 TO NB 15**** / RAMP CLOSED @ 0908 FOR APPROX 5 HRS"
"[31] 22; CT ADVISING WILL BE CLOSING THE RAMP TOMORROW MORNING AT 0900"
"[28] ^CT720 CONFIRMED THE CONTAINER IS EMPTY; IT *DOES* SAY LIQUID NITROGEN ON IT, AND IS QUITE LARGE -- 15-20 FT LONG, 20-30K GAL INDUSTRIAL TANK "

"[27] ^CT720 LL -- HE ROLLED UP ON THIS AND HAS BEEN 97 FOR A BIT / THE CONTAINER WILL BE ON THE LHS OF THE RAMP O/NIGHT (CORR 1020 EB 76 TO NB 15, THE LOOP RAMP) / CT722 CREW WILL BE RESPONDING TO CONE/BARRICADE OFF THE CONTAINER, AND WILL RE-RESPOND TOMORROW TO CLOSE THE RAMP AND ALLOW RESP PTY TO REMOVE THE CONTAINER"
"[23] CT CPZ LINE 22; PLS LET US KNOW IF THERE'S ANY CONFIRMED SPILL FROM THE CONTAINER, IF IT WAS HOLDING ANYTHING "
"[18] ^IS RESPONSIBLE PTY ARRANGING FOR SAFE REMOVAL OF THIS CONTAINER? "

"[17] CCTV -- CORR 1020 APPEARS TO BE EB 76 ONR TO NB 15, ON THE LOOP RAMP / THE CONTAINER IS NOT SOMETHING CT CAN REMOVE OR PICK UP -- THIS APPEARS TO BE A VERY LARGE CONTAINER THAT WAS ON THE BACK OF THE SEMI TK, LIKE A SILO, FARMING OR AS INDICATED SOME TYPE OF MATERIALS CONTAINER"
